Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Help Leytya with an alchemy request.
A merchant down the road was supposed to provide a list of ingredients, but time is short. Perhaps a word from a certain <PCCLASS:lcase> can hurry it up?
Look, <PCCLASS:lcase>, I'm really busy. Besides, Leytya ordered some obscure stuff. Stuff that requires an alchemist. Can you take this and help me out?
